message:
fix: resolve 7 arcade game bugs — key trap, chess AI, restart, styling (#8712)

- Release keyboard listeners on blur/visibilitychange to prevent key
  trap after leaving arcade games (#8702)
- Add timeout and abort mechanism for chess AI computation so it never
  hangs indefinitely (#8703); bump generation counter on reset/flip to
  cancel in-flight AI (#8704)
- Increase sudoku grid line contrast from border-border/30 to
  border-border/60 and box separators from purple-500/50 to
  purple-400 (#8706)
- Clear held keys and cancel animation frames on game restart for
  Pod Brothers (#8707), Kube Pong (#8709), and Kube Kart (#8710)
- Fix stale closure over score state in Kube Pong by using refs
- Stabilize callback deps with useCallback for helper functions

Fixes #8702, Fixes #8703, Fixes #8704, Fixes #8706, Fixes #8707, Fixes #8709, Fixes #8710

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
